name: eye_top_center
description: the midpoint of the mouse's top eyelid margin, horizontally centered over the eye. The eye is a big black circle when visible

name: eye_bottom_center
description: the midpoint of the mouse's bottom eyelid margin, horizontally centered under the eye. The eye is a big black circle when visible

name: nose_tip
description: the corner of the mouse's nose, on the left of the image. Where the downward slope of the front edge of the face meets the horizontal plane of the jaw.
